Tarwi is the Andean name for the lupin bean itself; dishes naming it (ensalada/sopa de tarwi) are lupin-based
Egyptian/Levantine name for salted, cooked lupin-bean street snack
Portuguese/Brazilian bar-snack name (tremocos) for salted, pickled lupin beans
Spanish name (altramuz/altramuces) for the pickled/salted lupin-bean tapa
Ecuadorian/Andean name for the lupin bean; ceviche de chochos or chochos snacks are lupin-bean, not seafood
Alternate Arabic transliteration of the same salted lupin-bean snack as termis
